segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Where are you off to? We're about to try the new cafe next to the bookstore. Have you been there yet? No. Is it any good? They have the most amazing pastries. good coffee, of course. I was just on my way to the library. I have to review my notes before class.
